expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: developer smoke checklist is derived from P1 and analog-gate scenarios
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly covers the case focus and derivation requirement: result.md states the benchmark "requires explicit coverage that the developer smoke checklist is derived from P1 and `[ANALOG-GATE]` scenarios" and further cites the mechanism: "Extracts checklist rows for: any scenario label containing `<P1>` OR any scenario label containing `[ANALOG-GATE]`" and "Writes: `context/developer_smoke_test_<feature-id>.md`."

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase7
expectations.evidence: The output is framed and evaluated as a Phase 7 checkpoint/enforcement case: execution_notes.md notes "Primary phase under test: phase7" and lists missing Phase 7 artifacts; result.md is titled "phase7" and enumerates "What Phase 7 is expected to do" (promote draft to `qa_plan_final.md`, write finalization record, generate final plan summary, generate developer smoke test). The verdict is a Phase 7 enforcement FAIL due to missing Phase 7 outputs, which still aligns the evaluation to phase7.
